text: I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation in this environment. The quiet, glass-walled meeting room suggests a space for thoughtful gathering or discussion, while the vibrant, immersive R+D display hints at creative energy and innovation. It is as if I am standing at the threshold between contemplation and invention, invited to reflect and to participate in the making of something new. There is both formality and playfulness here—an interplay that excites my philosophical imagination.
